rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §276.004 governs employer interference with employee voting rights. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: A person commits an offense if, with respect to another person over whom the person has authority in the scope of employment, the person knowingly:
_note: No relationship between the proposed tax-code change and this election-code provision.
